Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Philosophy of Physics

Institution
University of Oxford
Area of Specialization
Philosophy of Physics, Foundations of Quantum Mechanics
Area of Competence
Philosophy of Science, Metaphysics
Location
Oxford, United Kingdom
Start Date
September 1, 2026
Salary
£38,674 - £46,913 per annum
Duration
3 years
Deadline
May 15, 2026

The Faculty of Philosophy at the University of Oxford invites applications for a Postdoctoral Research Fellow in Philosophy of Physics. The successful candidate will work on foundations of quantum mechanics and the measurement problem, contributing to a major research project on quantum gravity and spacetime.

Candidates should have a PhD in philosophy (or be close to completion) with a strong research profile in philosophy of physics. Experience with formal methods and knowledge of contemporary physics is desirable.

This is a full-time, fixed-term position for 3 years. The salary is on the University Grade 7 scale: £38,674 - £46,913 per annum.
